name: resilience-coach
description: Adult-guided, synthetic-data SEL practice studio with an Apps SDK widget and safety handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Adult-guided resilience practice with synthetic data
interface.longDescription: Run and evaluate a short, adult-guided practice experience for ages 6–8, with bounded synthetic skill and plan memory, accessibility choices, a grown-up summary, and a demoable safety lock and handoff.
defaultPrompt: Start an adult-guided Resilience Coach practice.
Show the synthetic practice plan memory working.
